1: I have trusted also in the LORD LORD ; therefore therefore I shall not slide.
2: Try my reins and my heart.
3: And I have walked in thy truth.
4: Neither will I go in with dissemblers.
5: And will not sit with the wicked.
6: So will I compass thine altar, O LORD LORD :
7: And tell of all thy wondrous works.
8: And the place where thine honour dwelleth.
9: Nor my life with bloody men:
10: And their right hand is full of bribes.
11: Redeem me, and be merciful unto me.
12: In the congregations will I bless the LORD LORD .
